tracks.meaning: a body of water such as a pond or small lake, typically artificial or naturally occurring in a defined area
a shared fund of money bet by multiple players in gambling games, or the combined stakes in a competition
a facility containing water for swimming, diving, or recreational water activities
a kitty of money that accumulates and is won by the player who achieves a specific outcome, as in billiards or lottery
a shared repository or collection of resources available for common use by multiple people or systems
a group of people or companies with shared interests who combine their resources for a common purpose
a set of reusable software objects or data held in memory available for system processes
to combine resources, money, or efforts together with others for a shared objective
a collective arrangement where multiple parties contribute to and share in common assets or liability
a group of people considered collectively, often used dismissively or humorously
